revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月十二]][[zh:七月十二]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 12|qq=July 12}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 12''' is the 12th day of the month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kenkyū|en|Kenkyū|qid=Q1193933|lt=Kenkyū|1=Kenkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1192|en|1192|qid=Q19739|lt=1192|1=1192}} {{ill|August 21|en|August 21|qid=Q2823|lt=August 21|1=August 21}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} assumed the title of {{ill|Shogun|ja|将軍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q15903946}} (citation needed). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1707|en|1707|qid=Q6841|lt=1707|1=1707}} {{ill|August 9|en|August 9|qid=Q2782|lt=August 9|1=August 9}}) – The great temple complex of 【Zenko-ji】 in Nagano was completed. * {{ill|Kan'en|en|Kan'en|qid=Q1145723|lt=Kannen|1=Kan'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1748|en|1748|qid=Q7600|lt=1748|1=1748}} {{ill|August 5|en|August 5|qid=Q2783|lt=August 5|1=August 5}}) – Due to the accession of {{ill|Emperor Momozono|en|Emperor Momozono|qid=Q313864|lt=Momozono Tennō|1=Emperor Momozono}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1183728}} to {{ill|Kan'en|en|Kan'en|qid=Q1145723|lt=Kannen|1=Kan'en}}. * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1786|en|1786|qid=Q7760|lt=1786|1=1786}} {{ill|August 5|en|August 5|qid=Q2783|lt=August 5|1=August 5}}) – A period of heavy rains struck the Kantō region, resulting in the devastating {{ill|Tenmei no Kōzui|ja|天明の洪水|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmei no Kōzui|1=1786 Tenmei flood|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q85879120}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 7th year (leap July) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|September 4|en|September 4|qid=Q2855|lt=September 4|1=September 4}}) – {{ill|Furuichi Kōi|en|Furuichi Kōi|qid=Q5509794|lt=Furuichi Kimitake|1=Furuichi Kōi}}, a civil engineer (died {{ill|1934|en|1934|qid=Q18714|lt=1934|1=1934}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|August 27|en|August 27|qid=Q2822|lt=August 27|1=August 27}}) – {{ill|Onisaburo Deguchi|en|Onisaburo Deguchi|qid=Q1182931|lt=Deguchi Ōninsaburō|1=Onisaburo Deguchi}}, a religious leader and the first head of the Ōmoto school (died {{ill|1948|en|1948|qid=Q5165|lt=1948|1=1948}}).
== Deaths == * ({{ill|1227|en|1227|qid=Q5407|lt=1227|1=1227}} _月_日) – {{ill|Chinggis Khan|ja|チンギス・ハーン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chinggis Khan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to チンギス・カン|1=Genghis Khan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q720}}, the founder of the Mongol Empire (born {{ill|1167|en|1167|qid=Q19678|lt=1167|1=1167}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1731|en|1731|qid=Q6963|lt=1731|1=1731}} {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}}) – {{ill|Horita Masayasu|ja|堀田正休|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horita Masayasu|1=Hotta Masayasu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11427631}}, the first lord of the Ueno Province’s Yoshii Domain (born {{ill|1655|en|1655|qid=Q6975|lt=1655|1=1655}}). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1754|en|1754|qid=Q7623|lt=1754|1=1754}} {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}}) – {{ill|Hachisuga Shitsū|ja|蜂須賀至央|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachisuga Shitsū|1=Hachisuka Yoshihisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3125473}}, the 9th lord of the Tokushima Domain in Awa (born {{ill|1737|en|1737|qid=Q6993|lt=1737|1=1737}}). * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1762|en|1762|qid=Q7652|lt=1762|1=1762}} {{ill|August 31|en|August 31|qid=Q2830|lt=August 31|1=August 31}}) – {{ill|Emperor Momozono|en|Emperor Momozono|qid=Q313864|lt=Momozono Tennō|1=Emperor Momozono}}, the 116th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1741|en|1741|qid=Q7573|lt=1741|1=1741}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|11|7|13|6|12|8|7|0712|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ar:July 12 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月十二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月十二]] {{wikidata link|Q839749}} [[Category:Days 12 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar July]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
